rulings.Case Title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK vs. ZHU, FENG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Set Aside Default, And Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANT FEN ZHU'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons, Set Aside Default, And Vacate Default Judgment. THE MOTION IS DENIED. THE TIME HAS RUN FOR DEFENDANT TO SEEK TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT. CCP SECTION 473(d) IS SUBJECT TO THE TIME LIMITATION OF CCP SECTION 473.5. ROGERS V. SILVERMAN (1989) 216 CAL.APP.3D 1114, 1121-1122. =(302/PJM/VC)
Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 2, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICE INCORPORATED,A CORPORATI VS. THEODORE J MARR et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 3, CROSS-DEFENDANT CELESTIAL ASIA SECURITIES HOLDINGS LIMITED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 12/31/08 PER EX PARTE ORDER OF 12/11/08. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: JANET ANDERSON VS. MERCY MEDICAL CENTER BUILDING REDDING et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 8, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. SEE REGISTER OF ACTIONS UNDER MINUTES FOR 12/18/08 FOR TENTATIVE RULING IN ITS ENTIRETY. TENTATIVE RULING FAXED TO COUNSEL. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: AMINA RUBIO VS. MARK A HESLIP et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 9, DEFENDANT BRIAN PENSACK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE NOTICE OF JUNE 1, 2007 EXTENDED THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR 90 DAYS AND THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED WITHIN THE REQUISITE TIME BASED ON THE COMPLAINT'S ALLEGATIONS AS TO WHEN PLAINTIFF WAS HOSPITALIZED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MONTGOMERY-WASHINGTON HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Merits
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 10, PLAINTIFF NEIGHBORS FOR PRESERVATION, LAND USE AND COMMUNITY'S Motion For Judgment On The Merits IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 15, 2009 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLOTTE DANIELS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondents City And County Of San Francisco, Board Of Supervisors Of The City And County Of San Francisco, San Francisco Planning Commission And Real Parties In Interest A.F. Evans Development, Inc., Openhouse And The Regents Of The University Of California'S Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 11, Respondents City And County Of San Francisco, Board Of Supervisors Of The City And County Of San Francisco, San Francisco Planning Commission And Real Parties In Interest A.F. Evans Development, Inc., Openhouse And The Regents Of The University Of California's Writ Of Mandate IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO EXHAUST HER ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES, FAILS TO CITE TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD OR APPLICABLE LAW. THE PROJECT HAS MET ITS CEQA OBLIGATIONS, IS NOT SUBJECT TO THE NATIONAL HISTORIC PRESERVATION ACT AND THE COURT HAS FOUND THAT SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS DEFENDANT'S FINDINGS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KEN PODESTA-DANIELS et al VS. ALAN MURRAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 12, PETITIONER KEN PODESTA-DANIELS AND LAURIE PODESTA-DANIELS Motion For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted if proof of service is provided at hearing, no opposition filed. Otherwise off calendar. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR CREDIT VS. JOELLEN VORMOHR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 13, DEFENDANT MARY WILLIS AND ARTHUR VALDEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE FOR DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT PROVIDED EVIDENCE OF THE EXISTENCE OF A LANDLAND-TENANT RELATIONSHIP. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: BAY CITI PROPERTIES DE, LLC VS. THAN DU CO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, December 18, 2008, line 14, DEFENDANT THAN CO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS DENIED. SERVICE WAS EFFECTED UNDER CCP SECTION 415.46(c). =(302/PJM)
